title: lithospermum muelleri
intro: Lithospermum muelleri, also known as the alpine gromwell, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. This perennial herb has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Lithospermum muelleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Lithospermum muelleri can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
